text: Stepping into this space, I feel enveloped by a sense of curiosity and anticipation. The sterile hallway, contrasted by the glowing blue lights of the exhibit, invites me to cross a threshold between the mundane and the extraordinary. Once inside, surrounded by the bold "R+D" and philosophical texts, I feel as if I am drawn into an experiment of ideas—a liminal laboratory where wonder is cultivated. The questions on the wall and screen resonate with my own inner monologue: What makes this moment meaningful? Here, I feel alive to the subtleties of my own thought, both a participant and observer, tasting the world with new philosophical hunger.
